entries.title: On the stand, Elon Musk can’t escape his own tweets
entries.description: Elon Musk took the stand for the second day for his attempt to legally dismantle OpenAI.

entries.title: Meta is still burning money on AR/VR
entries.description: Meta is losing billions on Reality Labs each quarter, and its AI expenditures are only going to increase its spending.

entries.title: Sources: Anthropic potential $900B+ valuation round could happen within 2 weeks
entries.description: Anthropic is asking investors to submit allocations for the AI company’s latest fundraise within the next 48 hours, according to sources familiar with the matter.

entries.title: Apple was surprised by AI-driven demand for Macs
entries.description: Apple said it will be supply-constrained on Mac mini, Studio, and Neo in the next quarter, too.

entries.title: Legal AI startup Legora hits $5.6B valuation and its battle with Harvey just got hotter
entries.description: The two wildly fast-growing rivals have raised massive sums, pushed into each other's home turf, and now have dueling ad campaigns.

entries.title: After dissing Anthropic for limiting Mythos, OpenAI restricts access to Cyber, too
entries.description: OpenAI will begin rolling out its cybersecurity testing tool, GPT-5.5 Cyber only "to critical cyber defenders" at first.

entries.title: OpenAI announces new advanced security for ChatGPT accounts, including a partnership with Yubico
entries.description: OpenAI is launching additional opt-in protections for ChatGPT accounts. The new security initiative includes a new partnership with security key provider Yubico.

entries.title: Elon Musk testifies that xAI trained Grok on OpenAI models
entries.description: "Distillation" is a hot topic as frontier labs try to prevent smaller competitors from copying their models.

entries.title: FDA approval, fundraising, and the reality of building in healthcare according to BioticsAI founder
entries.description: BioticsAI CEO Robhy Bustami joined Isabelle Johannessen on Build Mode to discuss how the company has navigated a highly regulated space and kept the team motivated while cutting through all the red ta

entries.title: Google’s Gemini AI assistant is hitting the road in millions of vehicles
entries.description: The move signals Google’s push to bring more advanced, conversational AI into the driving experience.

entries.title: Stripe introduces Link, a digital wallet that autonomous AI agents can use, too
entries.description: Link lets users connect cards, banks, and subscriptions, then authorize AI agents to spend securely via approval flows.

entries.title: Salesforce is crowdsourcing its AI roadmap — with customers
entries.description: Salesforce lets its customers lead its product roadmap with the thinking that if one enterprise customer has a problem, the others likely do too.

entries.title: X announces a rebuilt ad platform powered by AI
entries.description: X is rolling out a rebuilt ads platform powered by AI as it works to grow revenue again.

entries.title: Meta says its business AI now facilitates 10 million conversations a week
entries.description: Meta said over 8 billion advertisers have used at least one of its GenAI tools

entries.title: SoftBank is creating a robotics company that builds data centers — and already eyeing a $100B IPO
entries.description: You need infrastructure to build AI and robots, but apparently you also need AI and robots to build infrastructure.

entries.title: Amazon’s cloud business is surging — and so is its capital spending
entries.description: The e-commerce giant is making more money than expected from AWS but it's also spending a lot, and will continue to do so in the near term, its chief executive said.

entries.title: Sources: Anthropic could raise a new $50B round at a valuation of $900B
entries.description: The maker of Claude has received multiple preemptive offers at valuations in the $850 billion to $900 billion range, according to sources familiar with the matter.

entries.title: ChatGPT Images 2.0 is a hit in India, but not a big winner elsewhere, yet
entries.description: Users in India are embracing ChatGPT Images 2.0 for creative, personal visuals — from avatars to cinematic portraits.
